title: Faith
question: Have I denied my faith, been ashamed of being Catholic, or hidden it out of fear?
description: Denying the faith or failing to witness to Christ can be gravely sinful (CCC 2089, 1816).
counsels: Acknowledge where you gave in to fear.
Ask God for courage to witness.
prevention: Practice small daily acts of faith
Surround yourself with people who support your faith

title: Faith
question: Have I neglected to grow in my faith or refused to learn about God?
description: Voluntary ignorance of the faith weakens our relationship with God (CCC 2088).
counsels: Seek to understand your faith better.

title: Faith
question: Have I participated in occult practices (horoscopes, tarot, Ouija, etc.)?
description: These practices reject trust in God (CCC 2116–2117).
prevention: Trust God instead of trying to control the future

title: Love of God
question: Have I deliberately missed Sunday Mass without a serious reason?
description: Deliberately missing Mass is a grave sin (CCC 2181).

title: Prayer
question: Have I neglected prayer or only prayed when I needed something?
description: Prayer is essential for spiritual life (CCC 2744).
counsels: Start with a few minutes daily.

title: Reverence for God
question: Have I used God's name in vain or used vulgar language?
description: Misusing God's name is sinful (CCC 2148).

title: Family
question: Have I seriously disobeyed or disrespected my parents?
description: Serious disobedience to parents is sinful (CCC 2217).

title: Authority
question: Have I been disrespectful to teachers or authority figures?
description: We must respect legitimate authority (CCC 2199).

title: Charity
question: Have I bullied, mocked, or harmed others (in person or online)?
description: Harming others is a grave sin (CCC 2302).

title: Charity
question: Have I spread gossip or damaged someone's reputation?
description: Detraction harms others (CCC 2477).

title: Charity
question: Have I refused to forgive or held grudges?
description: Refusing to forgive goes against the Gospel (CCC 2840).

title: Truth
question: Have I seriously lied?
description: Serious lying harms truth and others (CCC 2483).

title: Truth
question: Have I cheated in school?
description: Cheating is dishonest and unjust (CCC 2409).

title: Chastity
question: Have I viewed pornography or explicit content?
description: Pornography harms human dignity (CCC 2354).

title: Chastity
question: Have I committed masturbation?
description: Disordered use of sexuality (CCC 2352).

title: Chastity
question: Have I sent or received sexual content (sexting)?
description: This seriously harms dignity (CCC 2354).

title: Temperance
question: Have I used drugs, alcohol, or vaped?
description: Substance abuse harms the body (CCC 2291).

title: Justice
question: Have I stolen anything?
description: Theft requires restitution (CCC 2408).

title: Sloth
question: Have I wasted excessive time on social media, video games, or my phone?
description: Sloth neglects responsibilities (CCC 2733).

title: Humility
question: Have I been vain or obsessed with my appearance or social media image?
description: Vanity can become a form of idolatry (CCC 2113).
